title: KMU Assistant (Flowise)
tagline: KMU Legal Assistant rebuilt using Flowise — a no-code RAG pipeline with Qdrant, OpenAI and Claude.
description: This is a rebuilt version of the original KMU Assistant, now implemented entirely using Flowise — a no-code/low-code LLM orchestration tool. The project was developed as a Week 6 MVP and serves as a plug-and-play RAG chatbot for KMU legal queries. It uses a full retrieval-augmented generation pipeline: PDF documents are ingested, split into chunks, embedded via OpenAI, stored in a Qdrant vector database, and answered by Anthropic Claude. The entire stack runs on Docker via Dokploy and is hosted at thodeme.de.

stack.label: PDF File Loader + Recursive Character Splitter

highlights: Full RAG pipeline: ingest → embed → retrieve → answer
PDF documents chunked at 1000 chars with 200 overlap
Vectors stored permanently in Qdrant collection 'kmu-legal'
Runs entirely on self-hosted Docker via Dokploy
No-code pipeline built in Flowise (5 nodes)
Week 6 MVP — built as part of IC Builder Stack

items: Qdrant collection structure and ingested documents
Docker Compose configuration and environment variables
restricted.label: Pipeline config, infrastructure details, and documents are available on request
